title: Construction B binding operator
idea: The current deterministic explication->vector encoder: exact Hadamard XOR/TPR within a clause, whitened unitary HRR convolution across clauses/depth, fixed permutations for order, recursive concept-reference folding, superposition + normalise.
mechanism: Definition AST -> 8192-dim unit vector, training-free, byte-deterministic (encoder pin 40e8c8ba).
notes: The default encoder; X3 cosine-ban is its measured limitation (structural-overlap similarity).

title: Exact TPR binding (shallow)
idea: Alternative binding-op: exact tensor-product role-filler binding with orthonormal roles (zero crosstalk, exact unbind) for the shallow within-clause layer, accepting exponential blow-up only if kept shallow.
mechanism: Smolensky TPR within a clause; must compress across depth (which is what construction B already does via HRR).
notes: Deferred encoder-research alternative; construction B is already the compressed form of this.

title: WL-subtree features + compressed-sensing decode (construction C)
idea: Alternative binding-op: expand the explication into its WL-coloured subtree feature multiset, encode with a fixed sensing matrix, decode by L1 recovery.
mechanism: WL kernel + Arora-style compressed-sensing recovery; provable exact recovery at D=O(s log N).
notes: B and C are the same object; C is the formal lens for B's decodability.

title: Constructed box/hyperbolic taxonomy lane
idea: Add a deterministic geometric-entailment lane for the negation-free taxonomy fragment (EL-style subsumption as containment), constructed not learned.
mechanism: Sala combinatorial hyperbolic / Box2EL-style canonical construction over the concept dependency DAG, as an additive partitioned block (sparq SchemaHeader discipline).
notes: Regions honest only for the negation-free fragment; L1-survey open middle path.

title: Polarity-aware kernel similarity (X3 mitigation)
idea: A polarity/scope-aware similarity over kernel vectors so that a deep NOT is not near-invisible, lifting the X3 cosine ban for downstream similarity uses.
mechanism: notBoost-style polarity weighting or a decoded-structure comparator instead of raw cosine.
notes: ENABLER: any similarity-based idea (differentiable proving, kernel-kNN, soft unification) is blocked until this passes. Encoder-side, CPU, cheap.

title: Structural-decode similarity
idea: Compute meaning-level comparison over the DECODED structure (shared primes/subtrees relationally), never over the raw vector metric.
mechanism: Decode-then-compare using the kernel as cleanup memory; the E2 RDM instrument is the relational form.
notes: Sibling of idea-polarity-similarity in the X3-mitigation family.

title: AND-under-operator grammar extension (X1)
idea: Add an n-ary ClauseGroup node so conjunction can sit under an operator, unlocking disjunction via de Morgan and non-OTHER cardinality.
mechanism: kot-ast/2 ClauseGroup; encoder + identity version bump (ALGORITHM_VERSION, X0 regen).
notes: Decide only when a concrete blocked axiom class arrives (DL fork F5 kill: <20% need it).

title: Apply-clause grammar extension (X5)
idea: Add apply-clauses binding RelationalSchema concepts against their declared signature, so relations can be referenced not inlined (preserves the capacity budget).
mechanism: kot-ast/2 apply node; highest-value grammar extension per the DL analysis.
notes: Feeds L3a axiom encoding (litmus rule needs it); relational reuse frequency decides it (fork F6).

title: Vocabulary/basis extensions (molecule, physics, math, code)
idea: Extend the atomic basis beyond NSM-65: molecule tier, physics Z^7 dimension lane, math Metamath codebook, and code/structured constructs (feeds idea A).
mechanism: Additive typed lanes/codebook swaps; physics Z^7 exact integer, math via codebook+valency swap, code constructs new.
notes: physics/math lanes planned-not-built; code-constructs is a prerequisite for idea-structured-data-parser.

title: Axiom-layer expressivity (kot-axiom v0 vs +rules)
idea: The kot-axiom/1 sidecar expressivity: v0 validation operators (lookup/inverse/functional/count/disjoint) vs a bounded rule layer.
mechanism: Closed validation semantics as query operators; +Datalog-style bounded evaluation as engineering, semantics native.
notes: A fork WITHIN L3a; expressivity decided by L3a's missed-query failure analysis.

title: World-layer population route
idea: How stratum-4 fact records get authored: deterministic extraction from structured sources, LLM-authored+validator-gated, or hybrid.
mechanism: Provenance-stamped record authoring; authoring cost + record-error rate land on metric-vector V.
notes: A fork WITHIN L3a; also gates f2b-TRANSFER's record-backed external items (fact-coverage).

title: A2 trained-adapter injection
idea: Kernel vector -> trained affine adapter -> soft token into a frozen host; the one supported in-network injection cell.
mechanism: Deterministic kernel vector, per-model trained bridge; E5 PASS (content transfers to nonce concepts +28.5pp, 1 rung).
notes: Supported at one rung (135M), content-transfer only; no end-task-vs-text-null verdict yet.

title: Concept-toolkens (frozen kernel-derived embeddings)
idea: ~10^3 new vocabulary items whose embeddings are frozen kernel-derived vectors, with only one shared adapter trained (ToolkenGPT inverted).
mechanism: Frozen kernel vectors as toolken embeddings; the cheapest unrun A2 experiment.
notes: Cheap, direct, unrun; must beat the in-context-text null (Law 2).

title: External deterministic verifier seam (A5)
idea: generate -> P10 extraction -> deterministic decode-verify against canonical records + axiom sidecar -> retry.
mechanism: Tool-in-loop (Law-3 topology), deterministic checker not similarity search; F2 verdict FAIL on a degenerate primary, secondaries positive but MEASURED-UNAUDITED.
notes: f2b-REPLICATE (absolute non-inferiority primary + separation gate + shuffled-kernel control) is the live re-test; the oracle-leakage caveat gates the D-QA lift.

title: A1 frozen-vocabulary rows
idea: Kernel vectors as native frozen model I/O rows, pretrained around; zero trained interface.
mechanism: JL-projected kernel rows frozen in the embedding table.
notes: Law-1 empty cell; retained only as gated cheap falsification. A learned projection inside it silently becomes A2 (forbidden).

title: A6 kernel<->SAE label space
idea: Kernel as a canonical, versioned label/coordinate system for learned SAE features.
mechanism: Alignment map between kernel geometry and SAE feature directions; instrument over model internals.
notes: 2025 SAE correction (absorption, seed non-identifiability) is the opening; GDM bar = beat a simple baseline on a downstream task.

title: L1a kernel input canonicaliser
idea: Deterministic canonicalisation/annotation of kernel-covered input text before the model; training-free, external.
mechanism: Mapper (phrase->concept, a1-hybrid) rewrites/annotates covered spans to one canonical surface form; measured as variance reduction under paraphrase.
notes: Cheapest model-facing rung; must beat the LLM-paraphrase-normaliser null; abstention rate bounds coverage.

title: L1b concept-dense I/O + record-constrained output
idea: Kernel-covered spans enter as dense concept tokens; kernel-covered answers leave as P10 records rendered to canonical text.
mechanism: X4-projected kernel vectors through the E5 adapter (input); record-constrained decode (output); cuts prefill/KV and decode steps.
notes: Must avoid the LCM/SONAR fixed-space exponent penalty (edge-only, not internal target); scaling-exponent tripwire if trained beyond the adapter.

title: L2a kernel-labelled concept bottleneck
idea: A mid-network layer over a frozen host whose units are pinned 1:1 to kernel concept hashes (CB-LLM recipe, canonical vocabulary).
mechanism: Bottleneck head with versioned, content-addressed, seed-stable unit identities; merges A2+A6.
notes: Concept leakage is the known failure mode (measure with scramble arm); strongest interp-lane rung / A6 pivot.

title: L2b kernel-addressed in-network memory layer
idea: In-FFN product-key memory layer with a fraction of the key table pinned to kernel concept identities, values learned.
mechanism: Pinned keys (X4-projected or hash-derived) give per-token concept attribution + versioned edit-locality; values remain learned.
notes: Empty literature cell; frozen-embedding record predicts a pinned-key penalty (a fork to test, shuffled-kernel-keys mandatory).

title: L2c semantic-fixedness sweep (phi)
idea: Sweep phi = k/D, the fraction of the representation subspace pinned to kernel vectors, as a dose-response crossed with scale and in/out-of-kernel domain; includes the phi=1 LCM-analog endpoint.
mechanism: Seeded orthonormal pinned block, gradient-masked; phi in {0,.25,.5,.75,1}; de-confounds the LCM penalty (definitional vs sentence, partial vs comprehensive).
notes: PARAMETRIC cross-cutting axis; one experiment de-confounds the LCM anchor that gates the whole L1b/L2a/L2b family. Lite (frozen host) ready; full (exponent leg) Tier-4 double-gated.

title: L3a rules-engine oracle
idea: kot-axiom engine + world-layer index answers covered factual queries alone (no LLM in loop), with provenance and axiom-licensed refusal, at orders-of-magnitude lower cost.
mechanism: Deterministic mapper parse -> query grammar over kot-axiom relations -> unique-answer index lookup; e.g. mother(Elvis)=Gladys in microseconds on CPU.
notes: In progress. Cheapest-decisive; builds the kot-axiom engine owed anyway; also underpins idea-symbolic-inference-between-layers (its rules step).

title: L3b routed hybrid inference
idea: Deterministic router sends covered queries to the engine and everything else to the LLM; the deployable form.
mechanism: mapper-confidence + query-grammar match => engine; else => LLM; mis-route rate is a first-class gate.
notes: Composes with (not against) the verifier seam; must beat LLM+RAG-over-facts at matched cost.

title: L3c engine-in-decode
idea: Engine invoked mid-generation; covered spans constrained-decoded from engine-supplied records (deterministic speculative decoding).
mechanism: P10-in-reverse + decode-time integration; engine drafts the fact, model drafts the prose.
notes: Horizon of the L3 family; only worth designing if L3b passes and covered facts occur inside long generations.

title: CALM-hybrid: latent regularised toward kernel coordinates
idea: A CALM-style learned autoencoder latent softly regularised toward kernel coordinates on covered concepts (regulariser, not target).
mechanism: Learned reconstruction-optimised latent + a lambda pull toward canonical axes for covered concepts; the one untested middle path between fixed-target and free latent.
notes: Scaling-exponent kill mandatory (LCM/CALM named anchor); any measurable exponent degradation vs lambda=0 kills.

title: Sidecar-axiom / kernel-RDM training regularisers
idea: Render kot-axiom axioms as differentiable penalties, and use the kernel RDM/Gram as a relational anchor, during adapter/distillation training.
mechanism: LTN/semantic-loss over axioms; RDM-level (relational, X3-compliant) anchor during distillation.
notes: Cheap rider: add as arms to F4/F6 rather than new experiments.

title: Gradual-introduction training schedule
idea: Introduce kernel structure progressively over training (curriculum over phi, coverage, or regulariser weight) to avoid the frozen-embedding convergence penalty.
mechanism: Schedule that ramps kernel fixedness/coverage across steps; hypothesised to mitigate the 5-10x mismatched-frozen-embedding convergence cost.
notes: Named training-schedule axis (Jesse); crosses phi (L2c) as a time dimension; training-side so deferred.

title: Kernel as MoE expert-label instrument
idea: Probe open MoE routers/experts against mapper-detected kernel concepts (do experts cluster on kernel concepts beyond controls?).
mechanism: e8-style alignment over MoE experts instead of SAE features; instrument-first (consumer-side routing change is Law-1-exposed).
notes: Inference-only rider on the e8 machinery; needs >=2 MoE families to beat token-identity + shuffled controls.

title: Deterministic structured-data -> concept parsing (idea A)
idea: For structured input/output (code, math/Lean, config), a CODE-based deterministic parser maps structure to kernel concepts at inference time, extending the proven Lean->kernel math pipeline; hypothesised to generalise to most programming languages.
mechanism: Deterministic AST/grammar parser (not an LLM) at the encoder input edge and decoder output edge; benchmark = code-understanding + code-writing with vs without the parser built into encoder/decoder.
notes: SUB-PROGRAMME candidate: warrants its own benchmark. NOW slice = math/Lean (precedent exists, cheap); DEFERRED = general-code generalisation (needs the benchmark build + code-construct vocabulary). The generalise-to-most-PLs claim is STIPULATED and must be registered as an assumption before any prereg premises it.

title: Symbolic inference between layers (idea B)
idea: An inter-layer op: decode the hidden-state vector -> concepts (kernel), run symbolic inference over that concept set (rules-engine), re-encode resulting concepts -> vector -> next layer; variant = a dedicated hidden layer.
mechanism: Per-layer decode -> kot-axiom rules-engine step -> re-encode; the rules step is L3a's engine placed inside the forward pass.
notes: Highest-decisiveness, highest-uncertainty. Blocked until L3a's engine exists AND model-side hidden-state decode is reliable (X2 was encoder-side only) AND X3 is mitigated. Naturally sequences AFTER L3a. Law-1 exposed (modifies the forward pass).
